description_long: This shotgun features a long, cylindrical barrel with a perforated heat shield running along its top, likely for improved cooling and grip. The receiver and barrel are finished in a dark, matte metal, while the stock and foregrip are made of a rich, reddish-brown wood, giving it a classic, utilitarian appearance. The stock is full-sized and ergonomically shaped for shoulder support, with a smooth, slightly curved profile. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing a single trigger. The foregrip is positioned vertically beneath the barrel, providing stability during firing. Overall, the shotgun has a robust, functional design suitable for practical use in urban environments.
description: A classic shotgun with a perforated metal barrel, dark receiver, and reddish-brown wooden stock and foregrip. It has a robust, utilitarian design with a full stock and vertical foregrip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the perforated barrel, wooden stock, and vertical foregrip.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the circular barrel opening, the alignment of the foregrip, and the narrow profile of the stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, but from the other side, with the stock and barrel clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and foregrip, with the trigger guard partially visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with perforated heat shield along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
